payload.message: Generate end-of-day close summary for Android app/game organic growth. Before starting, set GitHub Project item '21:30 close summary + kill/double-down' to Stage='In Progress' in https://github.com/users/robbyasistant-del/projects/1. Deliver concise decision-oriented close with wins/fails/metrics gaps/kill list/double-down/top priorities. Save full markdown to market_intel/reports/<YYYY-MM-DD>-close-summary.md. After finishing: move item to Stage='Done', append relevant note with key decisions, and send Telegram completion message to 5049109527 with report path and tomorrow priorities.

jobs.name: playstore-top20-nightly
jobs.description: Update blended Top20 by country/region from puzzle-word-casual-hypercasual searches and alert on major rank moves

payload.message:
Run this workflow exactly:
1) Execute: node C:/Users/robby/.openclaw/workspace/prototypes/_market/update-top20.js
2) Detect today's date in Europe/Madrid (YYYY-MM-DD) and read: C:/Users/robby/.openclaw/workspace/prototypes/_market/data/alert-<TODAY>.txt
3) If alert text starts with [TOP20 ALERT, send Telegram message to chat 5049109527 with concise rises/drops and path: C:/Users/robby/.openclaw/workspace/prototypes/_market/top20-latest.html
4) If alert text starts with [TOP20 OK, do not send user-visible message; return NO_REPLY.
5) On errors, send short error alert to chat 5049109527 with failure reason and file path.

Run python C:/Users/robby/.openclaw/workspace/market_intel/crawler.py to collect trend data from reddit/google trends/appbrain into market_intel/data. Then send a short status with files updated and record counts, and above all a summary of the analysis of the main increases in trends in daily puzzle and/or word games, as well as a market analysis to understand business trends in this regard.

Run daily market intelligence for Android game/app organic growth. Before starting, set GitHub Project item '07:45 ASO/trends intel brief' to Stage='In Progress' in https://github.com/users/robbyasistant-del/projects/1. Collect and synthesize signals from X/Twitter, TikTok web trends, Google Trends/search, Reddit, Play Store/AppBrain if available. Produce concise Spanish+Spanglish brief and write full markdown report to market_intel/reports/<YYYY-MM-DD>-aso-growth-brief.md. After finishing: move item to Stage='Done', append relevant note (top signal + action + blocker if any), and send Telegram completion message to 5049109527 with file path and top 3 actions.

Use x-trends-monitor. Build daily brief for last 24h focused on puzzle/word/mobile game virality. Priority source: X/Twitter signals. If X API is unavailable, blocked, or credits depleted, immediately switch to fallback sources (Google Trends, Reddit puzzle/word communities, Play Store movement, web social chatter) and still deliver output. Output must be exactly 3 lines max: 1) Top trends ayer 2) Ideas puzzles/juegos virales 3) Accion hoy. Keep concise, concrete, and actionable in Spanish with light Spanglish.

Every day at 08:00 Europe/Madrid, run a FULL Prototype Factory workflow with QUALITY FIRST (not quick mockups). Before starting, update GitHub Project https://github.com/users/robbyasistant-del/projects/1 item matching title 'Daily 08:00 prototype batch (quality-first)' to Stage='In Progress'. Build exactly 3 prototypes in separate folders under C:/Users/robby/.openclaw/workspace/prototypes with date prefix. For EACH prototype produce polished index.html and detailed report.html (strategy, SEO/ASO/SEM, loop, rewards, KPIs, experiments, risks). Update cumulative prototypes/index.html, commit+push to robbyasistant-del/prototypes-lab, ensure Pages live. After finishing: move same project item to Stage='Done', append a short relevant note in the item body with what was shipped and risks, and send Telegram completion message to 5049109527 with URL + key outcome.

Generate WEEKEND strategic report (weekly rollup) for Android organic growth, using all daily reports from the current week. Source files to scan first: C:/Users/robby/.openclaw/workspace/market_intel/reports/*.md and prototype reports under C:/Users/robby/.openclaw/workspace/prototypes/**/report.html (this week only, Europe/Madrid week). Deliver in Spanish + light Spanglish, executive style, concise but high-signal.

Output sections:
1) Weekly Executive Summary (5-8 bullets)
2) Trend shifts detected (X/TikTok/Google/Reddit/Store) and confidence level
3) What worked vs what failed (evidence-based)
4) KPI weekly scoreboard (CTR, CVR/install proxy, D1, D7 if available, avg session, share rate) + data quality gaps
5) ASO/SEO strategy update: winning keywords, declining keywords, next-week keyword map
6) Prototype portfolio review: keep/iterate/kill matrix with rationale
7) Next-week plan (Mon-Sun): top 5 bets, experiments, and expected outcomes
8) Risk radar + mitigation
9) Clear decisions required from user (max 3)

Also write full long-form report to: C:/Users/robby/.openclaw/workspace/market_intel/reports/<YYYY-[W]WW>-weekly-strategy.md and include that path + prototypes index URL https://robbyasistant-del.github.io/prototypes-lab/ in the Telegram message.
